[Page 1]
Tanker Shipping
Bi-Weekly Report
March 11, 2025
• A Fragile Recovery in VLCCs Amid Macro Headwinds - The VLCC market Short-term Indicators
appeared to have found a temporary floor in early March, with shipowners
Momentum: Negative
showing renewed optimism for a potential recovery. Activity levels initially picked
Sentiment: Neutral
up as charterers sought to cover outstanding second-decade stems and advance
bookings for the third-decade program. However, despite some resistance from Fundamentals: Positive
owners, broader market weakness-particularly in other regions-has kept a
significant rebound in check.
